channel.title: notes on Patrick Armengol
channel.description: Recent content in notes on Patrick Armengol

item.title: Threat Intelligence
item.description: NOTE: this post is a work in progress These are my notes on threat intelligence and incident response. These notes are very general/broad and are meant as a reference for terminology, models, processes, and ideas. I’m not particularly happy with the organization of the sections in this post and am thinking of splitting it up. Understanding Intelligence Intelligence is high fidelity information that has been analyzed and contextualized, and can be used to influence decision making.
